examples: Perhaps they intend to assassinate me.
Secretary: President of the Steel Trust, you mean? Do you want to assassinate him?
In 1981, when John Hinckley tried to assassinate him, he cracked a string of jokes while doctors were dealing with near-fatal lung wounds.
Among the more curious charges being made against Estrada is that he plotted to assassinate Ramos.
Four Dutchmen, accused last month of attempting to assassinate Yugoslavia's president, Slobodan Milosevic, remained in custody.
